summary: Create a new Budgeted Production Quantity
description: Create a new Budgeted Production Quantity associated with the specified Project.

unit_of_measure.description: The measuerment of the install production quantity

project_id.description: The Project ID the Budgeted Production Quantity was created with

wbs_code_id.description: The Production Quantity Code for the Budgeted Production Quantity.

quantity.description: Amount of cost code budgeted to be installed

updated_at.description: Date the actual production quantity was updated

created_at.description: Date the actual production quantity was created

422.description: Error creating a Budgeted Production Quantity

cost_code_id.description: CostCode.  DO NOT provide if your project is configured for Task Codes.

wbs_code_id.description: The Production Quantity Code for the Budgeted Production Quantity. This is necessary if your project is configured for Task Codes. DO NOT provide if your project is not configured for Task Codes.

quantity.description: Quantity budgeted for a project cost code

enum: Any value present in the Company list of Units of Measure except those categorized as "Time"
